creator: sada@rr.iij4u.or.jp
text:
>> This seems that your XFree86 version < 3.3.3.
>> Install new X and this error would be vanished.

I'm sorry I've tested this port on 2.2.8-RELEASE with XFree86 3.3.3.
This is not a good environment for today's ports test.
I'd like to install -CURRENT system and try again.

Thanks.
